headline: How The Sirius Real Estate (LSE:SRE) Story Is Shifting After The Latest Equity Raise
summary: The fair value estimate for Sirius Real Estate has shifted from £1.25 to about £1.26, a small move that still puts the modelled price level above the recent offering price. Analysts linking this change to their latest research largely frame it as a valuation gap story, with the adjusted target reflecting updated assumptions rather than a wholesale rethink of the company. As you read on, you will see how this revised price target fits into the broader debate and how to keep track of the...
